Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell appeared by zoom for Wendy Winter (petitioner).
Darin Judd appeared by zoom for Christine Patterson (trustee/respondent).

The parties reported that they have had scheduling challenges with regard to mediation due to Mr. Judd's busy work schedule, that they are working through dates for depositions, that there are no objections to the proposed mediators, that substantial written discovery was completed some time ago, etc. Further discussion was held as to whether it makes sense to set the matter for trial now, or allow the parties time to get their discovery done before sending the matter out for trial. The Petition Determining Validility of Trust Amendment, and status of trial readiness are continued to August 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A case management conference is also set for August 19, 2024. The parties are to file a joint case management statement two weeks prior. Mediation is to occur no later than July 31, 2024. The parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trial Readiness
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Paul Gruwell, Esq., for Wendy Winter, Petitioner.
Darin Judd, Esq., for Christine Paterson, Respondent.

The court acknowledges the recently filed Joint Case Management Statement. At the query of the court, counsel provides updates regarding mediation efforts.

At the conclusion of discussion, the subject matters are continued to Apr-15-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Trial Readiness will be added for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Pliego/Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Dec-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Dec-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Liza Sternik appeared by zoom for Wendy Winter (Petitioner).
Darin Judd appeared by zoom for Christine Patterson (trustee).

Mr. Judd stated that he spoke with Mr. Gruwell, that there are outstanding matters such as subpoena issues and depositions that need to take place, and that he is open to mediation. The Court refers parties to meet and confer about mediation. Petition determining validity of trust amendment and Case Management hearing are continued to December 04, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to file a joint case management statement two weeks prior to next hearing.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Gruwell appearing via zoom for Wendy Winter (petitioner).
Darren Judd appearing via zoom for Christine Patterson (trustee).

Discussion was held in regard to the progress of discovery and that at the conclusion of discovery parties agree to mediation. The Petition determining validity of trust amendment and Case management hearing are continued to September 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Supplemental Case Management statement to be filed by August 30, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russ Rowen appeared by zoom for trustee.

Mr. Rowen stated that he has not been in touch with opposing counsel and that he is surprised to not see Mr. Gruwell here. Mr. Rowen also stated that they have not resulted in settlement, that they have exchanged written discovery and that they will have depositions taken soon. The court informed counsel that it will be issuing a case management order. The Petition Determining Validity of Trust Amendment is continued to June 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Continued To Mar-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Paul Gruwell, Esq. for Wendy Winter (Petitioner).
Darren Judd, Esq. for Christine Patterson (Trustee).

The Court noted that there was an answer filed and inquired about discovery. Mr. Gruwell stated that written discovery was served, noted that counsel for the other side was cooperating with that process, stated that responses are due in 10 days, that third party discovery will need to be done and depositions taken, and requested a 90-day continuance. Mr. Judd concurred with Mr. Gruwell's comments and the request for a 90-day continuance stating that the responses are done and will be filed.

The Petition Determining Validity of Trust Amendment is continued to March 15, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a further status hearing re: discovery.

Judge: Ceclia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Lozado. Matter not reported.

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Wendy Winter, Petitioner; Darin Judd, via Zoom, for Christine Paterson, Trustee/Objector.

The bench officer discloses in open court that he was a partner at the Hanson Bridgett Law Firm where Mr. Gruwell was an associate. No objections to the bench officer's disclosure are presented. The court acknowledges Ms. Paterson's objection which is pending in the court's e-filing queue and confirms with counsel that there isn't much the parties can accomplish today and advises that it will be continuing the matter and that it intends to issue a Case Management Order on or after the next calling of this matter.

The matter is continued to Nov-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
